name: KVH INDS INC.  DL-,01
summary: KVH Industries, Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets solutions that provide global high-speed Internet, television, and voice services via satellite to mobile users at sea, on land, and in the air. The company's products include satellite communication systems, inertial navigation systems, and tactical navigation systems, and is headquartered in Middletown, Rhode Island.
